title: Create Buildah issue template
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

Create a Buildah Issue template.

comments.body:
:pushpin: Commit c062228 has been approved by `rhatdan`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=rhatdan c062228ded79f84234f2f1631b0a7ffc17eb3beb -->
:zap: Test exempted: pull fully rebased and already tested.

@ripcurld0 I think we'll skip the "other useful info" field for now.  I think we're currently asking for as much info as I'm comfortable with and hopefully folks will put the other info in their description.  Let's see how the reports are filled out for a bit, then we can adjust as necessary.
